basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 35 Professor, Associate Professor and More posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad (ESIC) Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines.
qualification.details: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission)guidelines. NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on "Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025" will apply.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - Anaesthesiology (with Surgical Super Speciality)

salary_details.details: Professor: Consolidated pay 2,60,226/- per month Associate Professor Consolidated pay 1,73,045/- per month Assistant Professor Consolidated pay 1,48,669/- per month

selection_process: Academic credentials and interview performance Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled for 27th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad has announced a total of 35 vacancies for Teaching Faculty positions in various Super Specialty Departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC is 69 years, as per the latest guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Teaching Faculty positions ranges from Rs. 1,48,669/- to Rs. 2,60,226/- per month, depending on the post and designation.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad. Specific details regarding the venue and reporting time are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are required for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, specifically referencing the NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on “Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025”.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on academic credentials and interview performance, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a government job opportunity with ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, which is a government organization.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: The job type for these Teaching Faculty positions is contract-based.
